summary: A doctest embedded in doc/callbacks.rst at line 48 failed during documentation testing. All 41234 regular pytest tests passed, but this doctest produced output that did not match the expected output documented in the RST file.
root_cause: DocTestFailure in doc/callbacks.rst:48 — the doctest example in the documentation produced unexpected output, causing a test assertion mismatch.

evidence.reason: Explicitly identifies the doctest failure in callbacks.rst at line 48
Shows the failed test is the doctest in callbacks.rst
All regular pytest tests passed; failure is isolated to the doctest suite
Doctest run shows 1 failure, confirming the doctest failed
Exit code 1 confirms the job failed due to this doctest failure

suggested_fix: Review the doctest example in doc/callbacks.rst at line 48 to verify the expected output matches the actual output produced by the code example. Update either the code or the expected output in the docstring accordingly.

model_info._backfill_note: Pre-Codex-2026-05-14 F2 fix. The Claude shim now persists _model_info from every API call; this row predates that emit so resolved_model and usage are not recoverable. requested_model is set to the shim-level alias (haiku for v1, sonnet for v2) which is what the post-fix shim emits.
